hypotheses.title: KDM6Bâ†’EP300 Sequential Epigenetic Relay

novelty.finding: No paper connects KDM6Bâ†’EP300 sequential relay at mechanoenhancers. Gap confirmed.
novelty.search_query: KDM6B EP300 sequential epigenetic relay mechanoenhancers ECM stiffness

mechanism.finding: Biochemistry is sound but KDM6B-EP300 cooperation shown at promoters not enhancers (Malo 2013 PLOS ONE). KDM6B can act at enhancers in neuroblastoma context (Nat Comms 2021).

logic.finding: Critical unverified premise: assumes mechanoenhancers on soft ECM are Polycomb-repressed (H3K27me3+). Many enhancers are primed (H3K4me1+/H3K27me3-), making KDM6B irrelevant.

falsifiability.finding: CUT&RUN time course with KDM6B siRNA is a clean, specific experiment.

triviality.finding: Polycomb-to-active transition is well-known at promoters. Extension to mechanoenhancers is modest conceptual step.

counter_evidence.finding: KDM6B studies show promoter bias for H3K27me3 demethylation. EP300+KDM6B enriched at promoter but NOT enhancer of Pou5f1 (Malo 2013).
counter_evidence.search_query: KDM6B enhancer H3K27me3 demethylation not just promoter

groundedness.finding: Tayler 2026 verified (bioRxivâ†’MBC). STRING scores consistent. Critical gap: H3K27me3 at mechanoenhancers on soft ECM unverified.

hallucination_check.finding: Bridge components exist independently. Novelty is in the connection, not fabricated components.

claim_verification.finding: Tayler 2026 exists (may be 2025 pub date). STRING 0.754 is co-expression+text-mining, not experimental PPI. Cosgrove 2025 verified.

hypotheses.survival_note: Survives because KDM6B-ECM link is real, KDM6B can act at enhancers, connection to mechanoenhancers is novel. Wounded by unverified H3K27me3 premise and promoter bias counter-evidence.
hypotheses.strongest_kill_argument: If mechanoenhancers are in primed (H3K4me1+/H3K27me3-) state on soft ECM, KDM6B has no substrate and the entire hypothesis is irrelevant.

hypotheses.title: Piezo1â†’CaMKIIâ†’EP300 Rapid Pre-Priming
hypotheses.kill_reason: Fabricated protein property: CaMKII does not directly activate EP300. The documented p300 activating kinase is CaMKIV, not CaMKII. CaMKII actually inhibits CREB-CBP association. STRING 0.908 reflects pathway co-occurrence, not the functional relationship claimed.

novelty.finding: No prior work exists because the mechanism is wrong (CaMKIV, not CaMKII activates p300). The Science Advances 2025 paper shows Piezo1 goes through Rho-ROCK, not CaMKIIâ†’EP300.
novelty.search_query: Piezo1 CaMKII EP300 H3K27ac enhancer calcium priming

mechanism.finding: CaMKIIâ†’EP300 activation is NOT supported by published biochemistry. CaMKIV phosphorylates and activates p300/CBP (Chemical Reviews 2014). CaMKII phosphorylates CREB Ser-142 which is INHIBITORY for CREB-CBP interaction.

logic.finding: Two-phase temporal model is creative but built on false CaMKIIâ†’EP300 premise. The actual Piezo1 epigenetic pathway (Rho-ROCKâ†’H3K acetylation) doesn't use CaMKIIâ†’EP300.

falsifiability.finding: Prediction is testable in principle but the mechanism underlying it is wrong.

counter_evidence.finding: Piezo1 mediates viscoelasticity sensing in soft NOT stiff ECMs (Nature Comms 2025). Piezo1 Ca2+ also activates NFAT, calcineurin, eNOS â€” confounding CaMKII attribution.
counter_evidence.search_query: Piezo1 static stiffness vs dynamic compression mechanosensing

groundedness.finding: STRING 0.908 verified as score but misinterpreted (database+text-mining, not experimental PPI). Science Advances 2025 supports Piezo1â†’Rho-ROCK NOT Piezo1â†’CaMKIIâ†’EP300. CaMKIIâ†’EP300 activation has ZERO published evidence.

hallucination_check.finding: Novelty depends on CaMKIIâ†’EP300 claim which is likely wrong (conflation with CaMKIV). The 'novel' connection is an artifact of incorrect parametric knowledge.

claim_verification.finding: CaMKIIâ†’EP300 activation: FABRICATED. No published evidence for CaMKII directly phosphorylating/activating EP300 HAT activity. CaMKIV is the documented calcium-dependent p300 activator. STRING 0.908 score type is d+t (database+text-mining), not experimental.

hypotheses.survival_note: KILLED. The central bridge mechanism is a fabricated protein property.
hypotheses.strongest_kill_argument: CaMKII does not phosphorylate/activate EP300. CaMKIV does. The entire hypothesis architecture depends on a false kinase-substrate claim.

hypotheses.title: YAP-BRD4 Condensate Size Supralinear Encoding

novelty.finding: No paper proposes supralinear stiffness encoding via condensate cooperativity at mechanoenhancers.
novelty.search_query: YAP BRD4 condensate phase separation stiffness supralinear threshold switch

mechanism.finding: YAP nuclear concentration plateaus at high stiffness (>5.7 kPa per PNAS 2021 spatial model). The ~4x increase from 1â†’50 kPa oversimplifies a saturating relationship. Hill coefficient n=2-4 is speculative, not measured.

logic.finding: Linear inputâ†’cooperative amplifierâ†’supralinear output is sound in principle but input is sublinear/saturating, weakening the supralinear claim across the full stiffness range.

falsifiability.finding: 5-point stiffness gradient smFISH + JQ1 linearization test is excellent experimental design.

triviality.finding: Quantitative encoding model crossing mechanobiology and condensate biophysics is creative.

counter_evidence.finding: BRD4 condensate nature still debated (LLPS vs chromatin-tethered clusters). YAP nuclear sensitivity decreases at high stiffness. BRD4 condensates sensitive to ATP/PTMs beyond mechanics.
counter_evidence.search_query: BRD4 condensate true LLPS evidence against cluster debate 2024 2025

groundedness.finding: Zanconato 2018 is Nature Medicine not Nature Cancer. LLPS evidence is Cai 2019, not Zanconato 2018 (misattribution). Shin 2018 verified. Quantitative parameters (Hill n=2-4, threshold ~8-15 kPa) are speculative.

hallucination_check.finding: Components exist independently. Novelty is in the quantitative model â€” genuine creative synthesis.

claim_verification.finding: Zanconato 2018 published in Nature Medicine (NOT Nature Cancer). Paper focuses on BRD4 engagement, not explicit LLPS evidence (which is Cai 2019). YAP ~4x nuclear increase is approximately correct but oversimplified.

hypotheses.survival_note: Survives as genuinely novel quantitative model with real components. Wounded by YAP plateau, speculative cooperativity parameters, and LLPS debate.
hypotheses.strongest_kill_argument: If YAP nuclear concentration saturates above ~20 kPa, the supralinear encoding model fails in the fibrotic stiffness range (20-50 kPa) where it matters most.

hypotheses.title: MRTF-A Preferential Mechanoenhancer Occupancy

novelty.finding: No MRTF-A ChIP-seq under mechanical stiffness conditions published. CaRG motifs at mechanoenhancers found by Cosgrove 2025 (motif scanning, not direct binding).
novelty.search_query: MRTF-A ChIP-seq enhancer vs promoter binding mechanical stiffness

mechanism.finding: MRTF-A nuclear entry is real (Miralles 2003). EP300-MRTFA interaction real (STRING 0.710). BUT existing MRTF-SRF ChIP-seq shows promoter-dominant binding. Cosgrove 2025 shows 5x more promoter peaks on stiff ECM.

logic.finding: No mechanism proposed for WHY MRTF would preferentially redistribute to enhancers on stiff ECM. The hypothesis asserts enhancer preference without mechanistic explanation.

falsifiability.finding: MRTF-A ChIP-seq on 1 vs 50 kPa hydrogels is a clean experiment.

triviality.finding: MRTF-SRF at CaRG boxes is well-known. Extension to CaRG-box enhancers is modest conceptual step.

counter_evidence.finding: Esnault 2014 Genes Dev: MRTF-SRF binding predominantly at promoters. Cosgrove 2025: fivefold increase in promoter peaks on stiff hydrogels. Both oppose enhancer-preferential prediction.
counter_evidence.search_query: MRTF SRF promoter bias ChIP-seq genome-wide binding sites

groundedness.finding: Miralles 2003, STRING scores, CaRG motifs all verified. Core prediction (enhancer-preferential) contradicted by existing promoter-biased data.

hallucination_check.finding: Components real. Enhancer-preferential claim is untested (no mechanical ChIP-seq) but contradicts trend in existing non-mechanical ChIP-seq data.

claim_verification.finding: Miralles 2003 Cell verified. STRING scores consistent. CaRG motif enrichment from Cosgrove 2025 verified as motif scanning result (not direct binding). EP300-MRTFA 'direct recruitment' is inferred from STRING, not experimentally demonstrated.

hypotheses.survival_note: Survives because no mechanical ChIP-seq exists â€” prediction could still be correct despite trend. CaRG motifs at mechanoenhancers are real. Wounded by promoter-dominant existing data and lack of mechanism for enhancer redistribution.
hypotheses.strongest_kill_argument: Existing MRTF-SRF ChIP-seq consistently shows promoter-dominant binding, and Cosgrove 2025 ATAC-seq shows MORE promoter accessibility on stiff ECM.

hypotheses.title: YAP Condensates Mediate Looping-Independent E-P Contacts

novelty.finding: Phase-separation-mediated E-P contacts are a studied concept. The YAP-specific link to Cosgrove 2025 86.2% finding is novel. But competing mechanism (microcompartments, Goel 2023 Nat Genet) explains same phenomenon without condensates.
novelty.search_query: looping-independent enhancer promoter contact phase separation condensate chromatin

mechanism.finding: YAP condensates demonstrated in cancer cells on rigid plastic (Cai 2019), not fibroblasts on hydrogels. Surface tension ~10 pN is consistent with Shin 2018 but untested for chromatin in situ. Cancer cells have constitutively active YAP; fibroblasts do not.

logic.finding: Presents condensates as THE explanation for 86.2% looping-independent contacts when at least 5 competing mechanisms exist (transcription factories, eRNA, TAD proximity, microcompartments, condensates).

falsifiability.finding: Oligopaint FISH testable. But verteporfin control unreliable (massive off-target effects). 'Micro-C dark contacts' claim inherently hard to falsify.

triviality.finding: Creative connection of condensate biophysics to a specific quantitative finding.

counter_evidence.finding: Verteporfin has devastating YAP-independent effects: ferroptosis, proteotoxicity, FAK signaling (all confirmed in YAP-KO cells). Microcompartments (Goel 2023) explain looping-independent contacts without condensates. Multiple alternative mechanisms compete.
counter_evidence.search_query: verteporfin off-target effects beyond YAP autophagy ferroptosis

groundedness.finding: 86.2% statistic verified. Shin 2018 verified. Zanconato 2018 LLPS condensate claim MISATTRIBUTED (should cite Cai 2019). Cancer-to-fibroblast translation gap.

hallucination_check.finding: Zanconato 2018 LLPS attribution overinterpreted. The paper focuses on BRD4 transcriptional addiction, not explicit LLPS evidence (which is Cai 2019).

claim_verification.finding: 86.2% verified. Shin 2018 verified. Zanconato 2018 is Nature Medicine not Nature Cancer. LLPS evidence should cite Cai 2019 not Zanconato 2018 (wrong paper attribution). Surface tension estimates consistent.

hypotheses.survival_note: Survives as creative connection to the 86.2% paradox. Severely wounded by competing mechanisms (microcompartments), cancer-to-fibroblast translation gap, verteporfin unreliability, and Zanconato 2018 misattribution.
hypotheses.strongest_kill_argument: Goel 2023 Nat Genet shows microcompartments connect enhancers and promoters through compartmentalization independent of both loops AND condensates â€” explaining the same phenomenon without requiring YAP condensates.

critic_questions.question: What is the histone modification state of mechanoenhancers on soft ECM? If primed (H3K4me1+/H3K27me3-) rather than Polycomb-repressed, does KDM6B have any role?

Can the CaMKIIâ†’EP300 claim be replaced with CaMKIVâ†’EP300 (the documented calcium-dependent p300 activator)? Or should the mechanism redirect through Rho-ROCKâ†’histone acetylation (Science Advances 2025)?
How does the supralinear model account for YAP nuclear concentration plateau above ~20 kPa? Does the switch only work in the 5-15 kPa range?
What mechanism would cause enhancer-preferential MRTF redistribution on stiff ECM, given existing ChIP-seq shows promoter-dominant binding?
How do you distinguish condensate-mediated from microcompartment-mediated contacts (Goel 2023)? Can you use a more specific YAP inhibitor than verteporfin?

meta_critique.kill_rate_assessment: At minimum threshold. H2 kill is well-justified by fabricated protein property (CaMKIIâ‰ CaMKIV). Remaining 4 hypotheses genuinely wounded but not fatally flawed.
meta_critique.fabricated_claim_details: H2: CaMKII activates EP300 acetyltransferase activity â€” no published evidence; CaMKIV is the documented kinase
meta_critique.misattribution_details: Zanconato 2018 is Nature Medicine not Nature Cancer; LLPS condensate evidence should cite Cai 2019 not Zanconato 2018
